phaseId.description: Stable phase identifier (e.g., 'kickoff', 'review'). Used as the suspend resume-key so the host can disambiguate multiple in-flight gates within a run.

prompt.description: User-facing prompt rendered in the gate dialog.

answerSchema.description: JSON Schema for the answers payload. The host validates the user's response against this schema BEFORE resuming the run; mismatch returns a validation error to the user and the run stays suspended.

timeoutMs.description: Optional suspend timeout (default: no timeout). Bounded to 30 days. On timeout, the gate resolves with outputs.timedOut=true.
